description: Schema for overview stage evidence collection.

presenting_problem.description: Primary reason for visit captured verbatim when possible.
presenting_problem.title: Presenting Problem

onset_and_context.description: Narrative describing when the issue started and precipitating context.
onset_and_context.title: Onset And Context

prior_history.description: Previous treatment or relevant history if explicitly mentioned.
prior_history.title: Prior History

suicide_history.description: Historical reference to self-harm or suicidal ideation if acknowledged.
suicide_history.title: Suicide History

recent_suicidal_thoughts.description: Whether participant reported suicidal thoughts within the last week.
recent_suicidal_thoughts.title: Recent Suicidal Thoughts

substance_use_summary.description: Summary of substance or alcohol use noted during overview.
substance_use_summary.title: Substance Use Summary

medication_history.description: Prior medication usage or hospitalisation details if provided.
medication_history.title: Medication History

title: OverviewEvidence
